'''soyashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:klezmerlike|klezmerlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:klezmerlike|klezmerlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| soyashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:soyashithi|soyashithi]] || [[word:soyashiji|soyashiji]] || [[word:soyashishi|soyashishi]] || [[word:soyashiki|soyashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:soyashuthuthu|soyashuthuthu]] || [[word:soyashujuju|soyashujuju]] || [[word:soyashushushu|soyashushushu]] || [[word:soyashukuku|soyashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:soyashuthu|soyashuthu]] || [[word:soyashuju|soyashuju]] || [[word:soyashushu|soyashushu]] || [[word:soyashuku|soyashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:soyashufthuf|soyashufthuf]] || [[word:soyashufjuf|soyashufjuf]] || [[word:soyashufshuf|soyashufshuf]] || [[word:soyashufkuf|soyashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:soyashethe|soyashethe]] || [[word:soyasheje|soyasheje]] || [[word:soyasheshe|soyasheshe]] || [[word:soyasheke|soyasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:soyashothotho|soyashothotho]] || [[word:soyashojojo|soyashojojo]] || [[word:soyashoshosho|soyashoshosho]] || [[word:soyashokoko|soyashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:soyashotho|soyashotho]] || [[word:soyashojo|soyashojo]] || [[word:soyashosho|soyashosho]] || [[word:soyashoko|soyashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:soyashofthof|soyashofthof]] || [[word:soyashofjof|soyashofjof]] || [[word:soyashofshof|soyashofshof]] || [[word:soyashofkof|soyashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:soyashïfthïf|soyashïfthïf]] || [[word:soyashïfjïf|soyashïfjïf]] || [[word:soyashïfshïf|soyashïfshïf]] || [[word:soyashïfkïf|soyashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:soyashïfthïfthïf|soyashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:soyashïfjïfjïf|soyashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:soyashïfshïfshïf|soyashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:soyashïfkïfkïf|soyashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:soyashïfthïf|soyashïfthïf]] || [[word:soyashïfjïf|soyashïfjïf]] || [[word:soyashïfshïf|soyashïfshïf]] || [[word:soyashïfkïf|soyashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:soyashïfthïf|soyashïfthïf]] || [[word:soyashïfjïf|soyashïfjïf]] || [[word:soyashïfshïf|soyashïfshïf]] || [[word:soyashïfkïf|soyashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:soyashæthæ|soyashæthæ]] || [[word:soyashæjæ|soyashæjæ]] || [[word:soyashæshæ|soyashæshæ]] || [[word:soyashækæ|soyashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:soyashathatha|soyashathatha]] || [[word:soyashajaja|soyashajaja]] || [[word:soyashashasha|soyashashasha]] || [[word:soyashakaka|soyashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:soyashatha|soyashatha]] || [[word:soyashaja|soyashaja]] || [[word:soyashasha|soyashasha]] || [[word:soyashaka|soyashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:soyashafthaf|soyashafthaf]] || [[word:soyashafjaf|soyashafjaf]] || [[word:soyashafshaf|soyashafshaf]] || [[word:soyashafkaf|soyashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:soyashasha|soyashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:soyashësha|soyashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:soyashrosha|soyashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:soyashmusha|soyashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:soyashyasha|soyashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosoyashnkshësha|gosoyashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosoyashnkrosha|gosoyashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosoyashnkmusha|gosoyashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosoyashnkyasha|gosoyashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:soyayashasha|soyayashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:soyayashësha|soyayashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:soyayashrosha|soyayashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:soyayashmusha|soyayashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:soyayashyasha|soyayashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosoyayashnkshësha|gosoyayashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosoyayashnkrosha|gosoyayashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosoyayashnkmusha|gosoyayashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosoyayashnkyasha|gosoyayashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:seyæshasha|seyæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:seyæshësha|seyæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:seyæshrosha|seyæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:seyæshmusha|seyæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:seyæshyasha|seyæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goseyæshnkshësha|goseyæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goseyæshnkrosha|goseyæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goseyæshnkmusha|goseyæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goseyæshnkyasha|goseyæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:soyfashasha|soyfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:soyfashësha|soyfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:soyfashrosha|soyfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:soyfashmusha|soyfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:soyfashyasha|soyfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosoyfashnkshësha|gosoyfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosoyfashnkrosha|gosoyfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosoyfashnkmusha|gosoyfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosoyfashnkyasha|gosoyfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
